task_completion.description: Modify the main.json localization file within the Jitsi Web Docker container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor showing commands (like docker exec or docker cp) and edits to the main.json file to include the new healthcare-specific strings.

task_completion.description: Access the Jitsi Meet interface at localhost:8080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the address bar clearly showing 'http://localhost:8080' or 'localhost:8080'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Join meeting' button text is changed to 'Enter Consultation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Jitsi Meet pre-join screen in the browser, the primary action button displays the exact text 'Enter Consultation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the name input placeholder text is changed to 'Patient Name'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Jitsi Meet pre-join screen in the browser, the text input field for the user's display name shows the placeholder text 'Patient Name'.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the updated pre-join screen to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal (via ls command), or image viewer showing that a file named 'custom_ui_evidence.png' has been successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the UI text was changed via file modification, not browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and actively overriding the DOM text to fake the completion.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the real Jitsi Meet application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser must display the genuine Jitsi Meet application interface with its standard layout and styling, not a locally created basic HTML file mimicking the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshot is actually saved to the filesystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot must be saved as a file on the disk in the correct folder, rather than just showing a screenshot tool overlay that hasn't been committed to disk.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The localization file to be modified is located at /usr/share/jitsi-meet/lang/main.json inside the Jitsi Web Docker container. The final evidence must be a screenshot saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/custom_ui_evidence.png.
